entry.title: Re: Deployment failing for CAPM application when deploying to cloud foundry and HANA instance.
entry.content: As you can read in the logfile you have to check the logs of the Approuter. It crashed.

entry.title: Re: Material Master Nomenclature
entry.content: Add tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Master Data.

entry.title: Re: Reduce the number fo messages for BP-Replication
entry.content: Additional information: If you defined filter criteria using the Manual Replication Filter Criteria button, the system selects the Manual Replication Filter Criteria Available checkbox. During replication, the system ignores the preexisting filters defined in transaction DRFF and applies the manual filter criteria.

entry.title: Re: Reduce the number fo messages for BP-Replication
entry.content: Additional information: If you defined filter criteria using the Manual Replication Filter Criteria button, the system selects the Manual Replication Filter Criteria Available checkbox. During replication, the system ignores the preexisting filters defined in transaction DRFF and applies the manual filter criteria.

entry.title: Error No Memory Available in Preparation for Consolidation Group Changes / PCC
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I encounter an error when attempting to execute the Preparation for Consolidation Group Changes / PCC in HANA 2023.

Both the extended memory (EM) number 12.000.000.000 and the assigned memory (HEAP) number 12.000.000.000 have been allocated.

Error happen in include object FINCS_PCC_PCC2_F09 when collect data into variable gt_acdocu_pl . 

I have also implemented certain SAP notes regarding PCC, including the reduction of memory utilization; however, the error persists.

I would be really grateful for your advice and direction regarding this matter.

entry.title: Re: How to change draw signature dimensions and borders
entry.content:
Hello Maraja, Thank you for reaching out to us. Yes, there are certain limitations with the Draw Signature function. For more detailed information and assistance, please refer to the community blog linked below.

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-discussions/how-to-draw-signature-in-sap-build-apps/m-p/13650565#M1028

entry.title: Re: Unable to create Phone Calls in SAP Service Cloud V2...
entry.content: Thank you Ray! It's helpful

entry.title: Re: Deployment failing for CAPM application when deployin...
entry.content:
Hi , 

i have checked the log as well and tried to perform the fix for it still it's not working. Please find below screenshot of approuter log and package.json file

Thanks & Regards

Ayushi Shrivastava

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Clean Core Extensibility with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content:
With this implementation approach, you save developers efforts using managed runtime during interaction phase.

If it is an unmanaged implementation, then the developer should spend efforts in implementing the methods 'CREATE' , 'UPDATE', 'DELETE' in handler class

entry.title: Re: How can I Access ADLC in Public Cloud
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Deployment failing for CAPM application when deployin...
entry.content: You have to check if there is a start script in the package.json of your approuter.

entry.title: Re: Archived MDG Change Request isn't listed in "Display...
entry.content:
Hi

Have you tried to check this checkbox? 

I hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: SSR Challenges in SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @joris_quenee, we have already added OCC caching on commerce API side.

Regarding SSR Caching, the docs (your second link) explicitely mention, that it's not recommended to use the "cache" option of the SSR Optimization:

How and where (Technology / Location) would a custom cache be implemented? Are you talking about caching often used OCC Request Responses on the frontend nodes to increase SSR Speed?

entry.title: Filter latest log time from log data
entry.content:
Hello,

I have list of users, log data and log time when something was change in there accounts. 
I want to filter data in my model that I will see only latest log time for every users in every days.
I'm thinking about adding a script in Datapshere - GREATEST, but I don't know how to use it. 

Could you help me? Or maybe you know some different way to filter data like I want?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to configure. SAP BTP Destination to generate Successfactors LMS OAuth token?
entry.content: If you expect help you should provide more details about your destination configuration.

entry.title: Re: Pixelated / Low Resolution Image in the Image Control
entry.content:
@bill_froelich 

This is what inside my page, unfortunately my image displayed in low resolution.

I also tried to set direct URL in the "Image" parameter but the result was the same.

 

{
    "Controls": [
        {
            "FilterFeedbackBar": {
                "ShowAllFilters": false,
                "_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
            },
            "_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
            "_Name": "SectionedTable0",
            "Sections": [
                {
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "KeyAndValues": [
                        {
                            "Value": "{Matnr}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue0",
                            "KeyName": "/App/Rules/Utility/FormatMaterialNumber.js",
                            "Visible": true
                        },
                        {
                            "Value": "{DescriptionMat}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue1",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'ProductDescr')",
                            "Visible": true
                        }
                    ],
                    "MaxItemCount": 1,
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue",
                    "_Name": "SectionKeyValue0",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Layout": {
                        "NumberOfColumns": 2
                    }
                },
                {
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "KeyAndValues": [
                        {
                            "Value": "{EAN}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue2",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'BarcodeEAN')",
                            "Visible": true
                        },
                        {
                            "Value": "{CustMaterial}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue3",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'CustomerProduct')",
                            "Visible": true
                        }
                    ],
                    "MaxItemCount": 1,
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue",
                    "_Name": "SectionKeyValue1",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Layout": {
                        "NumberOfColumns": 2
                    }
                },
                {
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "KeyAndValues": [
                        {
                            "Value": "{TypePos}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue5",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'ItemType')",
                            "Visible": true
                        },
                        {
                            "Value": "{Qty}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue4",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'Quantity')",
                            "Visible": true
                        }
                    ],
                    "MaxItemCount": 1,
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue",
                    "_Name": "SectionKeyValue2",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Layout": {
                        "NumberOfColumns": 2
                    }
                },
                {
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "KeyAndValues": [
                        {
                            "Value": "{UM}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue6",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'UnitOfMeasure')",
                            "Visible": true
                        },
                        {
                            "Value": "{Tester}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue7",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'TesterQuantity')",
                            "Visible": true
                        }
                    ],
                    "MaxItemCount": 1,
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue",
                    "_Name": "SectionKeyValue3",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Layout": {
                        "NumberOfColumns": 2
                    }
                },
                {
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "KeyAndValues": [
                        {
                            "Value": "$(D,{DataCons},,,{format:'short'})",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue8",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'DeliveryDate')",
                            "Visible": true
                        },
                        {
                            "Value": "{Discount}",
                            "_Name": "KeyValue9",
                            "KeyName": "$(L,'DiscountCondition')",
                            "Visible": true
                        }
                    ],
                    "MaxItemCount": 1,
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.KeyValue",
                    "_Name": "SectionKeyValue4",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Layout": {
                        "NumberOfColumns": 2
                    }
                },
                {
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.Image",
                    "_Name": "SectionImage0",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "Image": "{Url}",
                    "Alignment": "Center",
                    "ContentMode": "ScaleAspectFit"
                }
            ]
        }
    ],
    "_Type": "Page",
    "_Name": "ShowSalesOrderItem",
    "PrefersLargeCaption": true
}

Can you please share your page code ?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Bill against payment
entry.content:
Hello Esaiteja,

The link at the table level can be established via the clearing document information. The table ACDOCA will have the DZ/RV documents as well as the clearing document. But the table BSE_CLR will have the information to establish the payment (clearing document) and the cleared billing (RV) document. We need to also check if the payment document itself is the clearing document, or there is a separate document which has cleared payment against the bill.  

Thank you!

entry.title: How to enable parallel processing on dwc concurrent calls to CAP service
entry.content:
Trying to make concurrent calls to CAP service using DWC and it is throwing "Caused by: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Could not determine dwc landscape base route"

java.lang.IllegalStateException: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Could not determine dwc landscape base route,
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance0(Native Method),
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance(Unknown Source),
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingConstructorAccessorImpl.newInstance(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Constructor.newInstanceWithCaller(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Constructor.newInstance(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.getThrowableException(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.reportException(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.invoke(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.stream.ReduceOps$ReduceOp.evaluateParallel(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.evaluate(Unknown Source),
at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.collect(Unknown Source),

Ashish

I checked su53 but there is no error and i activated all sicf services.But error still persist.

entry.title: Re: Add standard field to Fiori App F2358
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Integration Between SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud - Blog 1
entry.content: I need to automate the loading of a Dimension Table from SAP Analytics cloud to Datasphere. Can this be done. Any reference blogs

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content: Nice Session , thanks for explaining, Any roadmap from sap that force customer should use type script rather using Java script. Or any plan which will lead customer to migrate existing one to typescripts.

entry.title: Core EHS to SAP EHS
entry.content: Hello everyone, I have been working as a Project EHS Officer in Dubai for the past five years. I'm considering studying the SAP EHS module. Do you think this is a good decision? What are your thoughts?

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Clean Core Extensibility with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
entry.content: Great session! Very well prepared demo's. Thank you! 😃

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content: It was a good decision on TS. I understood using TS we can avoid runtime errors which may occur at execution level due to the wrong type mapping of data/variables. I'll implement TS for sure for further projects. Thank you so much 👏👏👏🙌🙌🙌

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content: Great starter session to begin with the development using TypeScript Mike! I hope more detailed ones comes soon 😀

entry.title: Offboarding tasks stuck on loading
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

A client recently went live on Onboarding 2.0 module. But raised an issue that responsible users are unable to complete offboarding tasks. The tasks keep loading without showing and the onboarding/offboarding dashboards too show No Data. I have granted all necessary permissions but still did not work.

Kindly help with your advise.

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 

SAP SuccessFactors Platform

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Call for ALM – APJ edition
entry.content:
Hi,

There is no registration required to join. In this page there is an Add to Calendar option using which you can create a calendar entry and join the session at the scheduled time.

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content: That's great to hear! I'm sure that once you start using it you won't go back

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content:
Hi @Harendra_singh167 ,

such Roadmap does not exist. The SAP Cloud Application Programming model provides you the option to go with Node.js or Java as natively supported languages. Because CAP is supporting Node.js which is a JavaScript flavor, we get TypeScript support as well. If you as a developer (Partner or Customer) want to use TypeScript instead of plain Node.js (JavaScript) because that is the expertise your development team has, or because it makes architectural sense, or any other reason, it is there available for you!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: • Hello David I have started my learning journey for sap Hana data engineer certification; there are ebooks that I should pay to complete the learning path but I can’t do it! I have used books from sap press and I am studying on them and in the free e-learning platform from sap learning. Can I mark the sections as completed using my books instead of buying them on the sap hub?

entry.title: Re: How to use XSUAA in FastAPI Python app
entry.content:
I did not find any straight forward solution to this, so I took a little turn around. Since we don't have `@sap/approuter` as a plugin for python/java applications yet. We will need to use Node for using the approuter.

Steps taken to achieve my goal:

1. Create a new node app for sap-approuter, check the below manifest.yaml 

- name: router
  routes:
    - route: fastapi-app.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com
  env:
    destinations: >
      [
       {
         "name":"fastapi-app",
          "url":"https://fastapi-srv.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com",
          "forwardAuthToken": true,
          "timeout": 600000
       }
      ]
  disk_quota: 256M
  timeout: 600
  memory: 256M
  path: web
  services:
    - a-xsuaa
    - a-logging-service

If you need more information on creating the node app, refer to this tutorial.

This destination will be used later to hit the FastAPI app through app-router app after authentication

2. Simple example xs-security.json for creating the xsuaa instance, where I will use our default IdP of the sub-account for authentication.

{
	"xsappname": "fastapi-app",
	"tenant-mode": "dedicated",
	"oauth2-configuration": {
		"redirect-uris": [
			"https://fastapi-app.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/**"
		]
	}
}

 3. The magic of redirect resides in the xs-app.json, where i will redirect all incoming requests after authentication to FastAPI App. Whenever the user hits app-router app url `fastapi-app.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com`, which in my case gives an impression of FastAPI app url, I will simply redirect them to FastAPI's route which in turns returns the landing page for the user.

{
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "/(.*)",
      "target": "$1",
      "destination": "fastapi-app",
      "httpMethods": ["GET"],
      "csrfProtection": false
    }
  ],
  "errorPage": [
    {
      "status": [403],
      "file": "resources/forbidden.html"
    },
    {
      "status": [404],
      "file": "resources/404.html"
    }
  ]
}

Here the destination should match the destination's name environment variable that we created in manifest.yaml that's how it know which server to call with the generated oauth token after authentication.

4. Example of the FastAPI route to return the landing page after authorization check

router = APIRouter()
templates = Jinja2Templates(directory="com/crack/snap/make/templates")


@router.get("/", response_class=HTMLResponse)
async def read_root(request: Request, security_context: Optional[SecurityContextXSUAA] = Depends(require_auth)):
	return templates.TemplateResponse("index.html", {"request": request})

5. I have skipped the role creation and role check for simplicity

entry.title: SAP Customer Success Day for BTP - Madrid - 9th of October
entry.content:
REGISTER HERE 👉 events.sap.com

This Customer Success Day will focus on Business Technology Platform.

During this exclusive event, you will be among fellow SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) pioneers, enabling you to connect with peers and SAP experts to gain insights and maximize your SAP BTP knowledge. This is credit to an environment where customers can learn from one another and provide feedback on how to enhance the SAP offering.
 
During this event you will hear from SAP leaders and adoption experts - learn about the experiences of other customers through keynotes and panel discussions, participate in hands-on workshops, hear the latest updates on SAP BTP roadmap – all with a focus on helping you get the most value from SAP BTP solutions. 

This is an exclusive event with limited capacity.
Secure your seat today!

REGISTER HERE 👉 events.sap.com

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content:
Thanks! The blog I mentioned has quite a lot more detail: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/why-the-typescript-sheriff-has-come-to-clean-up-your-javascript-part-1-of-3/ba-p/13550500

Today's session was focused on CAP, and in particular the TypeScript features which were added in CDS8

Online you will find lots of TypeScript resources, because it's very widely used outside of the SAP world

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content: @Sandra_Rossi I tried this change. However, Getting back from ALV to Selection is not a problem. From Selection screen of (ZSOUPLOAD) program to back to calling program is main issue. From selection screen (ZSOUPLOAD -1000 screen no) back to calling program (screen 400) is not working.

entry.title: Re: Quality Assurance Approval & Instant Forward for Transport Requests in S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content: Hi @danica09, "Set Quality Status" button will remain disabled until you select a particular TR to Approve/Reject via the said button. Once your TR is approved, you'll be able to forward it to the Prod tenant.

entry.title: Re: LCA -- Live cache not accessible
entry.content: how to start X_server

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content:
Thanks! At the moment it's very much a matter of choice.  Not every developer wants to use TypeScript, although I reckon it pays back the little extra effort required pretty quickly.

Amongst SAP products the support varies.  The SAP Cloud SDK team are enthusiasts IMO.  Their generated clients are typescript by default.  The UI5 team have provided new tutorials and samples. The CAP team have added good new features quite recently.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: CAP or CAT..

entry.title: Split Date of Production in Inbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hi, I have a requirement to Split Date of Production in Inbound Delivery for same batch:

For example:

I received goods 10 EA

3 for date of production 01/01/2024

4 for date of production 01/02/2024

3 for date of production 01/03/2024

Maybe when batch creation looks like this:

Is it possible via Standard? Or any other solution?

 

Thanks and Best Regards

Yunike Andriani

entry.title: Re: SA 17.0.10.5866: Can't call my Web service, error “40...
entry.content:
Run server:

dbsrv17.exe @lconfig_base.txt

lconfig_base.txt

-dt C:\TEMP
-n MyServer
-x tcpip(MyIP=127.0.0.1;DoBroadCast=No)
-xs http(MyIP=127.0.0.1;Port=8050;LOPT=ALL,HEADERS;LOG=WebAccsess.log)

WebComplain.db -n WebComplain

 executed the code as you wrote

call sa_server_option('WebClientLogFile', 'MyWebClientLog.txt');
call sa_server_option('WebClientLogging', 'On');

As I wrote earlier, when calling the web service from “Postman” everything is called without errors, below is the log (WebAccsess.log) of calling the web service from “Postman”:

 

Spoiler
[23/09/2024:11:47:39.620 0300] - 0.001 - 127.0.0.1:49962 - 8050 - "POST /WebComplain/wsWebTest1 HTTP/1.1" - 200 OK - 242 -
--> @HttpURI: /WebComplain/wsWebTest1
--> Accept: */*
--> @HttpVersion: HTTP/1.1
--> Host: 127.0.0.1:8050
--> Cache-Control: no-cache
--> Content-Length: 0
--> User-Agent: PostmanRuntime/7.42.0
--> Postman-Token: 11f8f8fe-8a91-46e9-b4a8-d88db4f33451
--> Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br
--> Connection: keep-alive
--> @HttpMethod: POST
<-- Connection: Keep-Alive
<-- Expires: Mon, 23 Sep 2024 08:47:39 GMT
<-- Content-Type: text/plain; charset=windows-1251
<-- Date: Mon, 23 Sep 2024 08:47:39 GMT
<-- Server: SQLAnywhere/17.0.10.5866
<-- Transfer-Encoding: chunked

When calling the same Web service from “ISQL” (via the WebTest1Run procedure), a “403 Forbidden” error occurs. Below is the WebAccsess.log when calling from “ISQL”:

 

Spoiler

 [23/09/2024:11:48:24.369 0300] - 0.000 - 127.0.0.1:49966 - 8050 - "POST /WebComplain/wsWebTest1 HTTP/1.0" - 403 Forbidden - 397 -

--> Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=windows-1251
--> Accept-Charset: windows-1251, UTF-8, *
--> Connection: close
--> ASA-Id: 4882e4c1a79f42d8b617f1d162eafbda
--> Host: 127.0.0.1:8050
--> @MediaType: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
--> Content-Length: 30
--> User-Agent: SQLAnywhere/17.0.10.5866
--> Date: Mon, 23 Sep 2024 08:48:24 GMT
<-- Connection: close
<-- Content-Type: text/html; charset=ISO-8859-1
<-- Expires: Mon, 23 Sep 2024 08:48:24 GMT
<-- Date: Mon, 23 Sep 2024 08:48:24 GMT
<-- Server: SQLAnywhere/17.0.10.5866

 

 

File MyWebClientLog.txt

Spoiler

[connid = 14, [23/09/2024:11:48:24.366 0300]]
[connid = 14, [23/09/2024:11:48:24.366 0300], REQUEST]
POST /WebComplain/wsWebTest1 HTTP/1.0
Connection: close
Host: 127.0.0.1:8050
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=windows-1251
ASA-Id: 4882e4c1a79f42d8b617f1d162eafbda
User-Agent: SQLAnywhere/17.0.10.5866
Date: Mon, 23 Sep 2024 08:48:24 GMT
Accept-Charset: windows-1251, UTF-8, *
Content-Length: 30

nCustomerID=1&cResultText=test
[connid = 14, [23/09/2024:11:48:24.374 0300], RESPONSE]
HTTP/1.1 403 Forbidden
Connection: close
Content-Type: text/html; charset=ISO-8859-1
Expires: Mon, 23 Sep 2024 08:48:24 GMT
Date: Mon, 23 Sep 2024 08:48:24 GMT
Server: SQLAnywhere/17.0.10.5866

<!doctype html public "-//IETF//DTD HTML 2.0//EN">
<html><head><title>403 Forbidden</title></head>
<body><h1>
403 Forbidden
</h1><hr><address>SQLAnywhere/17.0.10.5866</address></body></html>
[connid = 14, Protocol Error]
[connid = 14, socket closed]

 

It seems to me that the error in WebTest1Run, something I do it wrong, because from Postman everything is called normally, with an error is called only from the procedure WebTest1Run.

entry.title: Issue with actual data when we have data not published
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have an issue in an input schedule in SAC.

We have a column "Actuals" which is feeded by an import job from S/4 HANA. We have also an inputable column "Forecast" where users enter their forecasted amount.

Actuals data are imported every hours.

If we have data not published (user entered a forecasted amound and not published it), actuals data are not correctly displayed (it doesn't show the latest imported data).

Have you an idea of how to fix this issue ?

Thanks

Mat

entry.title: Re: i_journalentrytp - RAP Action
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check blog:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/how-to-use-i-journalentrytp-in-custom-rap-bo/ba-p/13581164#comment-694240

Best regards,
Take

entry.title: Re: OData V4 / CDS - $count not implemented
entry.content:
Hello,

OData is not created from SEGW transaction, it is created through CDS annotations which automatically creates OData.

PS4 version is S/4 HANA 2021 FPS01 and we are upgrading to S/4 HANA 2023 FPS01.

/Facts/$count=true doesn't work.

/Facts works well.

Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Solution Scout – the entry point for portfolio exploration
entry.content: Solution Scout is great. It is very useful for Business Architects

entry.title: Re: 🇩🇪 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
entry.content: Unfortunately, there is not but you are welcome to check out our SAP Developer YouTube channel with lots of tutorials and the Devtoberfest going on at the moment!

entry.title: Additional parameter to determine Pay Range
entry.content:
Our Pay Ranges are identified by the std 3 fields:

  • Pay Grade
  • Geozone
  • Legal Entity

we wish to add an additional criteria to fine tune the pay ranges.

I have enabled a custom field on the Corporate Data Model and it is validated by a picklist.
I have also added a field to JobInfo which is validated by the same picklist.

The system is NOT responding to the extra parameter which seems to imply that I am missing an association somewhere.
Any assistance would be greatly appreciated.

TIA,

sandy

entry.title: Re: Error During Installing SAP NetWeaver 7.52
entry.content: Do you have the necessary packages installed? There is enough RAM to run the DATABASE and the APPLICATION SERVER?

entry.title: Re: Enable Now Re-designed Panel Design
entry.content: Thanks Shane, can you please advise where that Companion config is in manager so I can check if I have it as I have just been asking the tech team to add in the parameter? Thanks

entry.title: Performance Issue with /SCWM/TO_CONFIRM in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Our company is using EWM in SAP, but recently we've noticed that some functions are taking a very long time to execute. I debugged the program and found that when the function /SCWM/TO_CONFIRM is executed and COMMIT WORK is called, it takes almost one minute to complete. This is significantly longer than expected.

Could you please advise how we can improve the execution time and make this process faster? I've captured and attached a screenshot showing the relevant part of the code.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Attachement API
entry.content:
Hi,

According to the Image/Thumbnail not shown in App Manage Product Master | SAP Customer Influence Portal, the feature for displaying product thumbnails in the "Manage Product Master Data" app within S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, is currently under development by SAP. For updates, please "Follow" the enhancement request on the portal or monitor the SAP product roadmap. Additionally, you may leave a comment on the enhancement request page to inquire whether upcoming features will include APIs for integrating product images.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Location of SAP How-to setup guides
entry.content: The right place to go is https://help.sap.com. Any reference to a document comes from there...

entry.title: Re: Environment,Health&Safety(EH&S) management module in SAP
entry.content: I have full course if you want

entry.title: Re: Credential Store Api - Post credential returns 401 error (mTLS)
entry.content:
Hi!

I have the same problem.

As far as I can see from the mTLS information given to the env-data in the cloud-foundry runtime, my credentials have no password attribute, that should be used to set the Basic-Auth header in the example.

entry.title: Differences between apps purchase order by account assignment and monitor purchase order items
entry.content:
Dear,

when we check the apps purchase order by account assignment and the app Monitor purchase order items we get different values in the columns Value still to be invoiced and Value to be invoiced. 

We would expect the values to be the same in both apps.

Attached you can find a list of purchase orders where the values are different. 

What causes these differences and how can we get the same values in both apps?

Thanks.

Best regards

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Differences between apps purchase order by account as...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please check the below link:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-is-value-to-be-invoiced-calculated-in-purchase-orders/qaq-p/12742206

 

Thanks and Regards

SAP SUPPORT

entry.title: Re: SAP for Energy & Utilities "Espresso Sessions"
entry.content: Have you had the chance to join the live session, or have you watched the recording? Which session in particular caught your attention? Let's discuss and compare experiences! I'm curious to hear your thoughts!

entry.title: how to get max date for an item request date
entry.content:
Hi

I've seen people ask this question but not able to get an answer so I'm trying again with a simple screenshot to show the issue.

I'm trying to get the most recent "request date" for an item (course). This will then tell us if an Item is being used or not.

I've created a custom calculated in the story. I've selected Aggregation, Selected Max as the Operation. And selected Request Date as the Aggregation Dimension. What I'm stuck on is you can only select Count under Measure. So the result is how many have requested on any given date. So the question is how do I get this to show the max date? See screenshot for the example.

I've looked all over the internet to try and find an answer but had no luck.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: CI/CPI: When exactly will the Apache Camel Upgrade to 3.14 take place?
entry.content: When exactly will the Apache Camel Upgrade to 3.14 take place on CI/CPI tenants (DEV/TEST/PROD)?

entry.title: Re: How to draw Signature in SAP Build apps
entry.content:
Dear all, the screenshot is about the signature box on an Iphone, I suppose. When shown on Android, the signature box has no style at all, being white box, no border, on a white plain background, meaning that it's impossible for the users to understand where they have to sign. Please consider to support this request to the product team:
- assign to the box at least a thin borde, a full page width and height and a light gray background
- giving the style properties to the draw signature component, to change the dimensions, the colour, the border and the background

Please let me know if taking this request to the attention of the developers is something that can be done this way.

Thank you, Dan, for your article.

entry.title: Question regarding Dynamic time navigation functions in SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

I used dynamic time navigation functions in the data model to create calculated measures (current year, month over month, and year to date) using lookup formula . I found that these calculated measures are displaying data in a table/chart only if the time dimension is drilled down to the lowest level (Year, Qtr, Month, Day). They do not display for any other upper levels.

Is there a way out of this?, I cannot display these measures if I want to aggregate them to say month level rather than the lowest grain.

Other information: I am using classical model/story

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: SAP EHS & Product Compliance Infodays 2024 -
entry.content:
Dear All,

Don't forget 24th 25th 26th SAP EHS & Product Compliance Infodays 2024 - EHS & Product Compliance Roadmaps & Strategy.

will take place online for 4 hours.

 SAP ERP SAP S/4HANA SAP EHS Safety Issue

entry.title: Editable Data Table and Searches
entry.content:
Hi,

I have two requirement.

The first requirement is to find a smart way to search and add products in a list with over 20K products.

The products list picker have only Live Search and if i need to filter two attribute, for example Brand and Description, this is not possible. The alternative solution is to have cascade list pickers, for example the first one with brands and second one with pre filtered products, unfortunately the customer need a fast way to do this.

The question is, what is the smartest and fast way to search(with more than one attribute), select and add products to the Order ?

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The second requirement is to have a smart way to add Items to an Order with as little click/tap possible and modify the main attribute of Item in a fast way. This is needed both in mobile(tablet) and desktop app.

I tried to use DataTable in Edit Mode like this with editable Quantity:

Unfortunately this solution doesn't works in Desktop App due to non supported Data Table Control.

How I can manage this ?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Substance Volume Tracking Block Purchase Orders S/HAN...
entry.content:
Hi Michael,

@Michael_Schalk 

Regarding the volume tracking I have a few further questions maybe you got time to answer in this post:

In the other post you wrote as a gap:

  • Tracking of planned quantities and the direct integration into the logistic/material management processes (which would also be the pre-requisite for blocking business process in cases where a threshold limit would be exceeded.

So it is planned to also block the business process in case the thresholds are exceeded right? May in this post I worded it incorrectly because its not about the Goods Issue posting to be blocked but the purchase order when the quantity is exceeded. Since this is a mandatory functionality for compliance when is it planned to implement this functionality? In the roadmap I am not able to get this information.

Especially for REACH it is mandatory to separate imports from non-EU. How is this possible in SVT? My ideas:

- Since the legal entity for business process scenario "import to" ony reference to receiving plant & company code I see no possibility to separate the delivering country.

- In the compliance requierement I don't see the possibility to specify the delivering country.

- The only possibility that I see is a different purchase order position type for EU->EU which is excluded from SVT.

Kind regards

Michael

entry.title: Re: Substance Volume Tracking Block Purchase Orders S/HANA Cloud Public Edition - Product Complianc
entry.content: Hi Michael

entry.title: Re: ASUG Best Practices
entry.content: Do you plan to attend this year's event? What do you think about this change? Do you like the idea of bringing these industries together under one roof to foster more collaboration and innovation? Share your thoughts here!

entry.title: Re: SAP API HUB: 401 on-premise call
entry.content: Hi Damian, did you find a solution for this problem ? I have the exact same problem and didnt find a solution yet. Regards SImon

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Good morning @David_Chaviano,

I'm Milosz from Poland, soon to turn 40 y.o. I've graduated from my BA Management studies 13 years ago, unfortunately there wasn't much about SAP there. After graduating, I've tried my own business, but it wasn't very successful. Eventually, a few years later, I started a new carrier from scratch as a freight forwarder. 

I have provided forwarding services to companies in the automotive, furniture, paper, apparel, industrial, and others. Since 2023, the transportation industry in Europe has fallen into recession, resulting in much lower demand for services I'm providing. At the same time, inflation began to rise rapidly in Poland, which is affecting the much higher cost of living. All this made me start looking for a new path for my career. I believe that my 6 years of experience in freight forwarding, combined with my knowledge and SAP certification, will allow me to provide effective solutions for companies operating in the SCM sector. Unfortunately, the current economic situation makes it difficult for me to pay for the certification. Therefore, I would like to request participation in the Digital Skills Initiative.

Kind regards,

Milosz

entry.title: Re: First release of B2B Integration Factory – Integration Packages and their Extensions
entry.content:
Hi Gunther,

 

I have followed the instructions above regarding the github pull request and created the following. Let me know if this is sufficient for now ?

 

Thanks

Saurabh

entry.title: Re: How to change draw signature dimensions and borders
entry.content:
Hell , Sankara

Thank you for your reply. I followed your suggestion and commented the article blog.

Basically I am asking to the maintainers of the "Draw signature" component to add some hardcoded properties to the Android version (slightly darker background and thin border or full page dimension).

The best would be to give to the app builders the option to style the component via some style properties.

Do you think that we could send this request? I am not the only one using it, and in Android is really hard to use.

entry.title: Need Help Identifying the Best Processing Instruction for clearing Incoming and Outgoing Payments
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m currently working on clearing both incoming and outgoing payments in SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition, and I’m having trouble finding the right processing instruction to use in the Automated Processing Rules - For Bank Statements. I’ve reviewed the available documentation, but I still can’t identify the best option for my needs.

So far, I’ve tried using FIFO_BASIC, EXMA, 010,..., but neither has worked for my reconciliation process. I’m looking for a processing instruction that can help me reconcile payments efficiently, given the criteria I have for clearing journal entries.

Has anyone had a similar issue or can anyone suggest which processing instruction would be best suited for reconciling both incoming and outgoing payments?

Any insights or recommendations would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: Split Date of Production in Inbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hello Yunike,

You need to create 3 different batch for each production date.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Update transaction details at asset block level for IN
entry.content:
Hello,

I think this will be a fit case for automation via SAP BOT.

Refer to the details in this link.

Thank you.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: How to draw Signature in SAP Build apps
entry.content:
There used to be a mailbox to which you could send your issues, perhaps feature request: buildapps@sap.com

At least in the past this was monitored closely, and as recently as a month ago this email was promoted by SAP.

entry.title: Incremental load in SAP SAC with Mysql source
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We want to do a incremental load with a mysql source in sap sacclassic model but we could not find it, could you please guide me how to do it.

entry.title: Re: Need to avoid defaulting company code in business partner while extending FI vendor role
entry.content: Any tips,please

entry.title: Re: RAP: How to use text instead of guid in value help?
entry.content: No, it does not change anything. The GUID is still displayed in brackets behind the text.

entry.title: Re: Steps to create API proxy in SAP API Management with API key verification policy and consumer su
entry.content:
Hi,

i tried to follow the steps of your blog, but i always get an error "401 not authorized" when testing the API. The generated API-Key seems to work.

 

In general the connection to the backend seems to work, because i can select the relevant entities when creating the API-Product comined with my API-Proxy.

API Provider Config:

Unfortunately the debug tool is not very helpful for me to find the error 😞 

Any idea why this does not work for me ?

Kind regards

Simon

entry.title: Crosstab Issue
entry.content:
Hi ,

Please will someone assist me with an issue I have.

I have a crosstab in crystal reports that calculates the number of invoices invoiced per hour.

 

See below.

 

 

I want to add another Columb next to the target line that will give me the percentage of invoices invoiced in that hour divided by the target number for each hour.

Is this possible? 

Many thanks

entry.title: Re: Start Your scripting Journey The Easy Way With SAP Analytics Cloud | Part Three
entry.content:
hey Daniel, good day!

Can we have the month on the input control default to the prior month? using Scripting.

 

Let's say this is September, but when I open a story, it should show the Aug data. or what ever the .prior month before the last posting month.

it should be performed by the input control (Month).

entry.title: SAP CAP Attachment Plugin
entry.content:
Hi Developers,

I would like to inquire whether the SAP CAP Attachment plugin supports multi-tenancy. Additionally, are there any limitations regarding file size and the ability to upload multiple files in an SAP CAP Node.js application?

Regards,

Syed

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Understand the Clean Core Extensibility Options for Cloud ERP
entry.content: Need more information on custom report in key user extensibility. Can you explain on custom report in public cloud?

entry.title: Re: Sales BOM: Can we have components in the Sales BOM fr...
entry.content: Hi, If it is the scenario then no issue 1) Create a sales order in first line item enter a material code eg. "line item number 100" 2) Enter second line item and find column "higer level item" enter the first line item "item number" eg. second line item number 200 and higher line item number 100 In above you are able to enter differnt plant codes in each line items. If any furhter detail help required please let me know Regards,

entry.title: Re: Calling Mashup callback from SAP Build screens
entry.content: After searching around for more than a day this solution worked for me. Thank you for sharing your experience !

entry.title: Re: Split Date of Production in Inbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hello Emmanuel,

My requirement is for same batch

Thanks and Best Regards

Yunike Andriani

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content: You didn't understand. You have to fix the code when leaving the ALV (LEAVE TO CURRENT TRANSACTION), to solve the problem when you're leaving the selection screen. Please try the code and debug as I explained, you will understand.

entry.title: Column editable on Fiori Element List report
entry.content:
Step1: Create list report fiori elements app

Step2: Add action buttons (Edit,Save,Cancel)

Step3: Once action buttons are added then ext/controller file will be generated

Step4: Prepare edit template for Responsive table

Step5: on Press edit button rebind the responsive table with edit template

Step6:  Now User can edit below editable fields(on edit template we have used Input UI element for 2 columns )

Step7: While changing on the Input itself we can create batch operation

Step8: on Press Save we need to execute batch Operation

Step9: Patch call success

 

Thanks,

Chamdeep

entry.title: Re: How can I make a column editable on Fiori Element List report?
entry.content:
Hello,

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam-discussions/column-editable-on-fiori-element-list-report/m-p/13874000#M252

entry.title: Re: Split Date of Production in Inbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hello Yunike,

It's not possible for the same batch.

Why can't you create 3 different batches?

entry.title: Re: How can I make a column editable on Fiori Element List report?
entry.content:
Hello, I think I got solution for this
please check the below link
https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam-discussions/column-editable-on-fiori-element-list-report/m-p/13874000#M252

entry.title: Re: Subscription Billing Forecast line items
entry.content:
Hi,

In S/4HANA 2023 FP01, billing schedule feature for periodic subscriptions is delivered in standard solution of BRIM - Subscription Order Management. It supports multiple use cases like total contract value split into desired instalments, ramp up prices, recurring discounts shorter than the contract term, etc. You can get details on Billing Schedule for Periodic Subscriptions | SAP Help Portal

Regards
Deepak

entry.title: PMMO_MM_INTEGRATION can't post 415Q 412Q 161Q
entry.content: hi,expert I had actived PMMO (under Valuated stock mode) during our production system(we had go-lived for 3 mothons),but some movetypes (such as 415Q,412Q,161Q) are not supported by PMMO, why ? and how can I post this movetype's document ? the follow is a example of the error message about 415Q Transfer between grouped project stock and other stock type is not supported Message No. PMMO_MM_INTEGRATION060 Diagnosis When Project Manufacturing Management and Optimization (PMMO) is active in the system, stock transfer between grouped project stock and other stock types (such as plant stock) is not supported.

entry.title: prospect & employees name are number only why it was names not number
entry.content: prospect & employees name are number only why it was names not number

entry.title: PMMO_MM_INTEGRATION can't post 415Q 412Q 161Q ducument
entry.content: hi,expert I had actived PMMO (under Valuated stock mode) during our production system(we had go-lived for 3 mothons),but some movetypes (such as 415Q,412Q,161Q) are not supported by PMMO, why ? and how can I post this movetype's document ? the follow is a example of the error message about 415Q Transfer between grouped project stock and other stock type is not supported Message No. PMMO_MM_INTEGRATION060 Diagnosis When Project Manufacturing Management and Optimization (PMMO) is active in the system, stock transfer between grouped project stock and other stock types (such as plant stock) is not supported.

entry.title: Re: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content: thanks Mike, Great Session with well-structured Demos

entry.title: Add master data scope items to Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello, 

Is it possible to add master data scope items to a scope in Cloud ALM? We are preparing some test cases and would like to add scripts such as BND Create Customer Master, BNH Create Profit Center, and BNM Create Cost Center and Cost Center Group. 

Is there another way of doing this except for creating it manually?

BR,

Ebba
